appraisal_events.evidence: « Mme de Cambremer est une femme du monde et Mme de Villeparisis est une arriviste. »
appraisal_events.explanation: An onlooker (Octave, unnamed in the alias map) disparages Mme de Villeparisis by labeling her an 'arriviste,' a socially discrediting term.

status_effects.explanation: Calling her an 'arriviste' locally lowers her perceived social legitimacy.
